name: Civo (Cloud-Native Kubernetes Cloud)
pricing_notes: K3s cluster from $10/mo (2 nodes); compute from $5/mo; no free tier

auth.notes: Personal access token in Authorization header

performance.notes: REST API; cluster provisioning takes 1-2 min (K3s vs 10+ min for managed K8s)

agent_readiness.notes: Cloud provider focused on managed K3s Kubernetes. REST API + civocli + Terraform provider. Python civopy SDK. Create K3s clusters in ~90 seconds. Marketplace one-click apps (databases, monitoring). Object storage, DNS, firewall. Regions: NYC, FRA, PHX, NYC. Smaller provider — affordable K3s clusters, no GKE/EKS/AKS complexity. Popular for learning Kubernetes without cloud provider lock-in costs.

gotchas: Smaller provider — less reliability track record than AWS/GCP/Azure
Limited regions compared to major cloud providers
civopy Python SDK less mature than major cloud SDKs
best_when: Learning managed Kubernetes without major cloud provider costs
Dev/test Kubernetes clusters at low cost
Indie hackers and small teams needing affordable K3s
Avoiding vendor lock-in to AWS/GCP/Azure managed K8s
avoid_when: Compliance-heavy environments requiring major cloud certifications
summary: Civo is a cloud provider focused on fast managed K3s Kubernetes — clusters in ~90 seconds. REST API + Terraform provider + civopy Python SDK. Object storage, DNS, marketplace apps. Affordable K8s for learning and dev/test workloads. Limited regions and smaller reliability track record vs major clouds. Popular for Kubernetes learning without EKS/GKE/AKS costs.
